title: Clutter: Bestiary
description: The entities from Clutter, plus more, updated, improved and split into a separate mod.
body:
# Clutter: Bestiary 

## [Wiki Page 📖](https://github.com/EmilsGithub/Clutter-Bestiary/wiki) 

**Clutter: Bestiary** is a mod that adds **<u>more than 20 new creatures</u>** to the game. These creatures fall into three categories: real-world animals like Beavers, Capybaras, Emperor Penguins, and Jellyfish; mythical or magical beasts such as Mossblooms and Potion Wasps; and whimsical fantasy critters like Booplets and Echofins.

## 🦌 Mobs:
### 🌍 Overworld
<details>
<summary>Beavers</summary>

## Beavers

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Saplings
* Other: Will help you strip logs and craft more sticks from planks.

![beaver](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6481172d-cf1e-4d4b-aa48-2a98eaf173a1)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Booplets</summary>

## Booplets

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: N/A
* Other: 
    * Can be sheared for string.
    * Will scare Zombie-like mobs.

![booplet](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6a79e090-1faa-4d2b-9e45-b217ceb1d964)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Butterflies</summary>

## Butterflies

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Sugar
* Other: 
    * Comes in sixteen overworld variants.
    * When hatched from cocoons, there is a chance they drop Butterfly Elytra Smithing Template Shards, which can be used to create Butterfly Elytra Smithing Templates, which are then used for creating different Butterfly Elytra.
    * Bottelable.

![butterfly](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/eed53af8-9b6c-4f3e-ad0e-52ea1c5bb9da)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Capybaras</summary>

## Capybaras

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Melon
* Tamed With: Melon Slice
* Other: Will sleep during night, healing nearby entities.

![capybara](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3a73fe37-a17b-4ec2-907a-e30e02f84dea)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Chameleons</summary>

## Chameleons

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Butterfly in a Bottle
* Tamed With: Apple
* Other: Will attack butterflies, and also other mobs the player targets when tamed.

![chameleon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b4208d62-7217-470d-95b1-670bc4223cb4)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dragonflies</summary>

## Dragonflies

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Other: Adds ambiance. Will hover over Lily pads occasionally.

![dragonfly](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b7d88cb8-220e-44bd-ad27-805346971294)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Emperor Penguins</summary>

## Emperor Penguins

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Fish
* Other: Will lay eggs when bred.

![adult_emperor_penguin](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/08cc4409-a30f-42ba-8cd5-0eac441e2f69)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Kiwi Birds</summary>

## Kiwi Birds

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Seeds
* Other: 
    * Will lay eggs when bred.
    * Will dance to jukebox music.

![kiwi_bird](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6d4c8c08-28e5-45e9-ab32-b6621cd63d97)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Koi</summary>

## Koi

* Behavior: Peaceful
* Bred With: Kelp
* Other: 
    * Will lay eggs when bred.
    * Patterns are picked at random from parents, with a low chance of getting a rare version.
    * Bucketable.

![koi](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bbb92c04-beff-47f8-95a6-ffbc72fcfe1a)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Manta Rays</summary>

## Manta Rays

* Behavior: Neutral
* Bred With: N/A
* Other: 
    * Will hunt Jellyfishes.
    * Spawns in different sizes. (One rare "Elder" variant can be found.)

![manta_ray](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f3450778-7edf-4063-92f8-5a667e6a4b19)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Jellyfishes</summary>

## Jellyfishes

* Behavior: Passive (Will Sting nearby, Non-Aquatic Entities)
* Bred With: N/A
* Other: N/A

![jellyfish](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0f4bdd86-056b-435f-89ab-46b96eda5005)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mossblooms</summary>

## Mossblooms

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Big Dripleaf
* Tamed With: Spore Blossom
* Other:
    * Comes in two variants.
    * Horned variants will drop their antlers occasionally. (They will also grow back.)
    * Ridable
    * Will prevent farmland from breaking when landed on.
    * Has a chance to make crops grow ever so slightly faster.

![mossbloom](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/43d3666d-1a03-47f7-81a1-0eb09f69cbe4)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Seahorses</summary>

## Seahorses

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Sea Pickle
* Other:
    * Comes in four variants.
    * After being bred, one of the parents will eventually hatch multiple babies.
    * Bucketable.

![seahorse](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fd1a41e4-b766-457e-9e9a-fef0e37bcc69)

</details>

<details>
<summary>River Turtles</summary>

## River Turtles

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Apples
* Other:
    * Comes in two variants.
    * Will occasionally harvest kelp.
    * Bucketable.
    * Will bask in the sun occasionally.

![River Turtle](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6eee0d6a-fcaa-441f-af1b-3352237e9d81)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Coatis</summary>

## Coatis

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Glistering Melon Slices
* Tamed With: Special taming, see below.
* Other:
    * Comes in three variants.
    * Will pick up dropped items when wild.

* Taming:
    * Will have to be fed Honey from Honey Bottles three **Minecraft days** in a row.
    * Once this has been done, the Coati will start walking towards it's burrow.
    * Once it arrives at it's burrow, it will start to dig up whatever items it has foraged, as well as a baby Coati.
    * The Baby Coati can be tamed with Melon Slices.
* Once Tamed:
    * Can be told to sit with a normal interaction.
    * Can be equipped with a chest.

![Coati](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5938bb59-e039-44e8-adac-3d1e3532677e)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Red Pandas</summary>

## Red Pandas

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Bamboo
* Tamed With: Special taming, see below.
* Other:
    * Comes in three variants.
    * Will sleep occasionally.
    * Will try to intimidate each other occasionally.
* Taming:
    * Once interacted with, with an empty hand, the Red Panda will request a specific item.
    * Give the Red Panda the item it's craving, three times in a row and it will be tamed.
* Once Tamed:
    * Can be told to sit with a normal interaction.
    * If sneaking while interacting, the Red Panda will stay in the area where you issued the command.

![Red Panda](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2a3a6cbc-d251-4320-9776-39575431a966)

</details>

### 🔥 Nether
<details>
<summary>Butterflies</summary>

## Butterflies

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: Sugar
* Other:
    * Comes in three nether variants.
    * When hatched from cocoons, there is a chance they drop Butterfly Elytra Smithing Template Shards, which can be used to create Butterfly Elytra Smithing Templates, which are then used for creating different Butterfly Elytra.
    * Bottelable.

![butterfly](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/83b5e395-39e5-4374-aa44-8c1fa3a768ef)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ember Tortoises</summary>

## Ember Tortoises

* Behavior: Neutral
* Bred With: Fire Charge
* Other:
    * Will target Hoglins and Zoglins
    * After being hurt enough, will go into a defensive state for some time.

![ember_tortoise](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/09a88a3e-568c-4674-9ea0-6e2aab35e66b)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crimson Newts</summary>

## Crimson Newts

* Behavior: Neutral
* Bred With: Crimson Roots
* Tamed With: Weeping Vines
* Other:
    * Will target anything the player targets when tamed.
    * Grows fungi on it's back, which can be sheared of. (Will grow back.)
    * Spawns in different sizes.

![crimson_newt](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5d8d5aae-d372-4246-935c-e8f8ecabf815)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Warped Newts</summary>

## Warped Newts

* Behavior: Neutral
* Bred With: Warped Roots
* Tamed With: Twisting Vines
* Other:
    * Will target anything the player targets when tamed.
    * Grows fungi on it's back, which can be sheared of. (Will grow back.)
    * Spawns in different sizes.

![warped_newt](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/66626b74-7db7-49a2-99a4-77a698a0d92a)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Potion Wasps</summary>

## Potion Wasps

* Behavior: Passive
* Bred With: N/A
* Other:
    * Spawns with different "Potion Sacs".
    * When hurt, will drop it's potion sac which will then spawn a potion cloud.

![potion_wasp](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/202dbd7a-b5c8-41c4-9990-70d1a07a59d4)

</details>

### 🌌 End
<details>
<summary>Echofins</summary>

## Echofins

* Behavior: Passive (Ish)
* Bred With: N/A
* Other:
    * Two different variants: Chorus and Levitating.
    * Will occasionally target the player and apply effects depending on the variant.
    * Bucketable.

![chorus_echofin](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/699e9816-7ac5-478a-a48c-a5c432d24b78)
![levitating_echofin](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d95aaacf-0a7a-436b-82d0-643526fc0af1)

</details>

Almost every mob will also spawn in modded biomes, like those introduced by: Biomes o Plenty, Regions Unexplored and Terralith.

_Many of these mobs originate form the mod **Clutter** but as of this mod's release, **Clutter** will only receive partial updates as priority has been put on splitting the mod in smaller pieces, like **Clutter: Bestiary**._

## 🪽 Other Features:
### 🦋 Butterfly Elytra
Butterfly Elytra function identically to vanilla Elytra in terms of flight mechanics, only the patterns of different colors sets them apart. Players can collect and wear 19 different variants, each with its own unique color scheme and aesthetic.

![Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FkbDiLgR/images/c3686cbc7cd84a16ce141be701eacc6d07c063c5.png)

## Translations:
|Language|Added By|Support
|--|--|--|
|English|Included|Always|
|Russian|Eviort|<= 1.0.1|



![Bisect Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmilsGithub/Clutter-Mod-Repository/refs/heads/main/Images/Bisect%20Banner.png)
All my mods, including **Clutter: Bestiary** are partnered with **Bisect Hosting** so if you want to start a new server, make sure to give them a try! Use the code **Clutter** to get **25% off your first month!**

_Not tested on Quilt but it might work anyways._
